sections.paragraph:
ἀναζέω (ζέω ‘boil, seethe’) intr. (so Soph., Hippocr. et al.; Περὶ ὕψους p. 67, 5 V.=44, 4 [206 verso]; Plut., Art. 1019 [16, 6], Mor. 728b; Ex 9:9, 10; 2 Macc 9:9) boil up of mud, etc., in the netherworld ApcPt 16, 31.

intr. intr. = intransitive

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 62
